title: kitsky Handheld Cordless Vacuum Cleaner - Lightweight Car Vacuum Cleaner - 12000PA Powerful Suction, Long Battery Life, Led Lights, Waterproof Hepa Filter - for Car, Stair, Sofa, Pet, Corner Cleaning
features: MAXIMUM SUCTION, MINIMAL EFFORT: Achieve deep, thorough cleaning effortlessly with this portable vacuum's suction power. Perfect for homes and offices, it efficiently removes dust, crumbs, and pet hair from carpets and hard floors, ensuring a cleaner environment with its powerful motor and durable battery life.

NEWLY FULLY UPGRADED Waterproof HEPA Filter: designed for unlimited washability without losing suction—unlike others in the market that degrade post-wash. Made from innovative high-polymer PET material, our filter ensures lasting performance. Plus, enjoy an extra waterproof HEPA filter on us with your purchase.

Bright LED Lighting, No Missed Spots: Unique LED lighting design illuminates even the darkest corners and under furniture, easily revealing hidden dust and debris. This ensures a comprehensive cleaning coverage without any missed spots.

LIGHTWEIGHT, 650G, & CORDLESS: This ultra-lightweight, 650g cordless vacuum can be effortlessly operated by anyone, from women to children, making vacuuming tasks simple. Its lightweight and cordless nature ensures supreme portability, allowing for convenient usage and transport to any location, facilitating easy cleaning everywhere.

ENHANCED CLEANING TOOLS: Featuring a handheld, cordless design, this vacuum includes two essential attachments for comprehensive cleaning. The brush attachment effectively removes hair and dust trapped in upholstery, while the crevice tool is ideal for detailed cleaning in tight spaces and corners.
